jobs.name: morning-ops
jobs.message: Execute Morning Ops per AGENTS.md. Update shell surfaces only. Do not send outbound text unless action is required.

jobs.name: evening-wrap
jobs.message: Execute Evening Wrap per AGENTS.md. Update shell surfaces only. Do not send outbound text unless action is required.

jobs.name: weekly-agenda
jobs.message: Execute Weekly Exec Agenda per AGENTS.md and publish/update the weekly agenda surface.

jobs.name: task-sync
jobs.message: Execute Task Sync per AGENTS.md. Reflect the canonical task source into Chieflane by publishing, patching, or closing surfaces. Keep surfaceKey stable for the same task.

jobs.name: surface-maintenance
jobs.message: Execute Surface Hygiene per AGENTS.md. Archive done surfaces older than 12 hours, close stale meeting prep after the meeting ends, refresh stale summaries older than 24 hours, and deduplicate by surfaceKey.

jobs.name: kaizen-review
jobs.message: Execute Weekly Kaizen per AGENTS.md and publish/update the kaizen digest surface.
